---
title: "Econometrics Tutorials"
subtitle: "Economics and Finance · Sapienza University of Rome · Faculty of Economics"
lang: en

format:
  html:
    toc: false
    number-sections: false
    fontsize: 1.25em
    linestretch: 1.7
---

Materials for the tutorials of the undergraduate **Econometrics** course.

### Installing R and RStudio

1. Download and install **R** from [cran.r-project.org](https://cran.r-project.org).
2. Download and install **RStudio** from [posit.co/download/rstudio-desktop](https://posit.co/download/rstudio-desktop).

---

## Introduction to R

| No. | Topic | Materials |
|----:|-------|-----------|
| 1 | Introduction to R | [Slides](introduction/introduction.html) · [R Script](introduction/introduction.R) |
| 2 | Regression with `fixest` | [Slides](introduction/regression_with_fixest.html) · [R Script](introduction/regression_with_fixest.R) |

---

## Tutorials

| No. | Topic | Materials |
|----:|-------|-----------|
| 1 | Regression, dummy variables, and confidence intervals | [Notes](tutorial1/tutorial1.html) · [R Script](tutorial1/tutorial1_script.R) |
| 2 | Multiple regression | [Notes](tutorial2/tutorial2.html) · [R Script](tutorial2/tutorial2_script.R) |
| 3 | Nonlinearity: log specifications | [Notes](tutorial3/tutorial3.html) · [R Script](tutorial3/tutorial3_script.R) |
| 4 | Nonlinearity: polynomials | [Notes](tutorial4/tutorial4.html) · [R Script](tutorial4/tutorial4_script.R) |
| 5 | Nonlinearity: interactions | [Notes](tutorial5/tutorial5.html) · [R Script](tutorial5/tutorial5_script.R) |
| 6 | Linear Probability Model (LPM) | [Notes](tutorial6/tutorial6.html) · [R Script](tutorial6/tutorial6_script.R) |
| 7 | Probit and Logit | [Notes](tutorial7/tutorial7.html) · [R Script](tutorial7/tutorial7_script.R) |
| 8 | Regression with panel data | [Notes](tutorial8/tutorial8.html) · [R Script](tutorial8/tutorial8_script.R) |
| 9 | Regression with instrumental variables | [Notes](tutorial9/tutorial9.html) · [R Script](tutorial9/tutorial9_script.R) |
| 10 | Regression with instrumental variables, part 2 | [Notes](tutorial10/tutorial10.html) · [R Script](tutorial10/tutorial10_script.R) |

---

## Problem Sets

| Questions | Solutions |
|-----------|-----------|
| [Problem Set 1](problem-sets/problem_set_01.html) | [Solutions](problem-sets/problem_set_01_solutions.html) |

---

## Other Material

| Simulation | Topics | Link |
|------------|--------|------|
| October 2025 | Review of log models | [HTML](problem-sets/log_models_review.html) |

---

Report typos or errors by opening an [issue](https://github.com/andrerecio/econometrics-undergraduate/issues).
